title: firtool 1.131.0 generates references to non-existant layer files

features.name: include directive for disabled layer file
features.description: Code should include a `include preprocessor directive referencing a layer-specific file that is conditionally excluded by a layer-disable flag, such that the include target may not exist at compile time
features.snippet:
`include "layers-MyModule-Verification.sv"
// Verification layer is disabled; the included file is never generated
